_comment: Single source of truth for all item affixes. Run build_affixes.ps1 to regenerate affix_template.sql from this file.

affixes.name: Blast Wave: +15% Damage
affixes._purpose: Flags shared with Ice Lance (flags=[131072,0,0]) — this affix affects both spells.

affixes.name: Blast Wave: -5s Cooldown
affixes._purpose: Flags shared with Ice Lance — cooldown mod has no effect on Ice Lance (no CD), harmless overlap.

affixes.name: Ice Lance: +15% Damage
affixes._purpose: Flags shared with Blast Wave (flags=[131072,0,0]) — this affix affects both spells.

affixes.name: Ice Lance: +5% Crit
affixes._purpose: Flags shared with Blast Wave — crit mod also applies to Blast Wave.

affixes.name: Hammer of the Righteous: +20% Dmg, +5% Crit

tooltip.display_name: Hammer of the Righteous: +20% Dmg, +5% Crit

affixes.name: Sinister Strike: -10 Energy Cost
affixes._note: Sinister Strike costs 45 energy; -10 brings it to 35.

affixes.name: Sinister Strike: Free Cast
affixes._note: Sinister Strike costs 0 energy. -1000 flat covers all ranks.

_removedAffixes_note: Affixes moved here are deleted from affix_template on next update_affixes.bat run. Full data is kept for history and can be restored by moving back to 'affixes'.

target._carrier_note: Rank 1 spell ID. Provides the SpellFamilyName used for matching.

effect._op_note: Modifies cast time. Other useful values: 0=DAMAGE, 1=DURATION, 7=CRIT_CHANCE, 11=COOLDOWN, 14=COST.
effect._value_note: Flat milliseconds. -10000ms = -10 seconds, making any Smite with cast time ≤10s instant.

tooltip._tooltip_note: Entry 3884 in SpellItemEnchantment.dbc. Client patch-4.MPQ must be in WoW Data/ folder.

removedAffixes.name: Lesser Heal: +100% Healing
removedAffixes._min_quality_note: 1=white and above - same as Smite affix, so they roll randomly against each other

target._carrier_note: Rank 1 spell ID for Lesser Heal.
target._flags_note: flags[0] bit 18 = Lesser Heal family bit. Verified from Spell.dbc: matches all ranks (IDs: 2050, 2052, 2053).

effect._op_note: SPELLMOD_DAMAGE (op=0) controls both damage and healing amount for spell modifiers.
effect._modifier_note: 108=PCT (percentage). value=100 means +100% = heals for double the normal amount.
effect._value_note: +100% percentage increase to heal output. Lesser Heal Rank 1 normally heals 36-45; with affix: 72-90.

tooltip._tooltip_note: Entry 3885 added to SpellItemEnchantment.dbc. Client patch-4.MPQ has been rebuilt.

removedAffixes.name: Smite: +100% Crit Chance
removedAffixes._purpose: Smite has a 100% higher chance to critically strike. Stacks with gear/talent crit.

effect._op_note: op=7 (SPELLMOD_CRITICAL_CHANCE) adjusts the spell's crit chance in percentage points.
effect._modifier_note: 107=FLAT. For crit chance, FLAT means percentage points added directly (not a % of existing crit).
effect._value_note: +5 percentage points of crit. If the caster has 20% spell crit, Smite now crits at 25%.

removedAffixes.name: Smite: -500ms Cast Time
removedAffixes._purpose: Smite casts 0.5 seconds faster. Smite has a 2.5s base cast; this brings it to 2.0s.

effect._op_note: op=10 (SPELLMOD_CASTING_TIME). FLAT unit is milliseconds; PCT is a percentage reduction.
effect._modifier_note: 107=FLAT in milliseconds. Use negative to reduce cast time, positive to add cast time.
effect._value_note: -500ms. Smite base cast 2500ms becomes 2000ms (2.0s). Use -10000 to make it fully instant.

removedAffixes.name: Arcane Shot: 50% Crit Chance, +100% Damage
removedAffixes._purpose: Dual-effect affix: Arcane Shot costs double mana but deals double damage. High-risk, high-reward. Cast-time penalty skipped — SPELLMOD_CASTING_TIME cannot add time to instant spells (base cast=0ms, modifier fires after instant check).

effect._op_note: op=14 (SPELLMOD_COST). PCT with positive value increases mana cost.

effect2._op_note: op=0 (SPELLMOD_DAMAGE). Doubles damage as the payoff for the mana penalty.
effect2._value_note: +100% damage. Both effects share the same flags/carrier so both apply to Arcane Shot.

removedAffixes.name: Arcane Shot: -5s Cooldown
removedAffixes._purpose: Arcane Shot cooldown reduced by 5 seconds. Base cooldown is 6s; with affix: 1s.

effect._op_note: op=11 (SPELLMOD_COOLDOWN). FLAT unit is milliseconds. Negative value reduces cooldown.
effect._value_note: -5000ms = -5 seconds. Arcane Shot base cooldown is 6000ms; with affix: 1000ms (1s).

_affix_examples_note: Examples below are NOT built into SQL. They are reference templates showing each modifier type. Copy an entry into 'affixes' and assign a real id/weight/enchant_id to activate it.

affix_examples.name: Smite: +15% Damage
affix_examples._purpose: Increases the damage Smite deals by 15%. Affects all ranks.

effect._op_note: op=0 (SPELLMOD_DAMAGE) scales the spell's direct damage output.
effect._modifier_note: 108=PCT. value=15 means the spell hits for 115% of its normal damage.
effect._value_note: +15%. Smite Rank 12 (48123) hits for ~765-857 base; with affix: ~880-985.

tooltip._tooltip_note: enchant_id=0 = no tooltip until a DBC entry is created.

affix_examples.name: Smite: +100% Crit Chance
affix_examples._purpose: Smite has a 5% higher chance to critically strike. Stacks with gear/talent crit.

effect._op_note: op=7 (SPELLMOD_CRITICAL_CHANCE) adjusts the spell's crit chance in percentage points.
effect._modifier_note: 107=FLAT. For crit chance, FLAT means percentage points added directly (not a % of existing crit).
effect._value_note: +5 percentage points of crit. If the caster has 20% spell crit, Smite now crits at 25%.

affix_examples.name: Smite: -500ms Cast Time
affix_examples._purpose: Smite casts 0.5 seconds faster. Smite has a 2.5s base cast; this brings it to 2.0s.

effect._op_note: op=10 (SPELLMOD_CASTING_TIME). FLAT unit is milliseconds; PCT is a percentage reduction.
effect._modifier_note: 107=FLAT in milliseconds. Use negative to reduce cast time, positive to add cast time.
effect._value_note: -500ms. Smite base cast 2500ms becomes 2000ms (2.0s). Use -10000 to make it fully instant.

affix_examples.name: Smite: -10% Mana Cost
affix_examples._purpose: Each cast of Smite costs 10% less mana. Scales with all ranks automatically.

effect._op_note: op=14 (SPELLMOD_COST) reduces the mana/resource cost of the spell.
effect._modifier_note: 108=PCT. Negative value reduces cost; positive increases it.
effect._value_note: -10%. Smite Rank 12 costs 385 mana base; with affix: ~347 mana.

affix_examples._ranks_note: Player-ranked chain carrier: 3044. All ranks: 3044, 14281, 14282, 14283, 14284, 14285, 14286, 14287, 27019, 49044, 49045. Other Arcane Shot IDs in the CSV (35401, 34829, etc.) are NPC/scripted variants — use carrier=3044 for the player spell.

affix_examples.name: Arcane Shot: -15% Mana Cost
affix_examples._purpose: Arcane Shot costs 15% less mana. Useful — Hunters spend mana on every shot.

effect._op_note: op=14 (SPELLMOD_COST). Reduces the mana cost of each cast.

affix_examples.name: Arcane Shot: +5% Crit Chance
affix_examples._purpose: Arcane Shot has a 5% higher crit chance. Synergizes with Hunter crit talents.

effect._op_note: op=7 (SPELLMOD_CRITICAL_CHANCE). FLAT adds percentage points of crit chance.
effect._modifier_note: 107=FLAT. +5 = five percentage points of additional crit chance for this spell only.
effect._value_note: +5% crit. If Hunter has 25% ranged crit, Arcane Shot now crits at 30%.

affix_examples.name: Arcane Shot: +1000ms Cast Time
affix_examples._purpose: Adds a 1-second cast time to Arcane Shot, which is normally instant. This is an example of adding cast time to an instant spell — useful as a downside/balance affix.

effect._op_note: op=10 (SPELLMOD_CASTING_TIME). FLAT in milliseconds. Positive value ADDS cast time.
effect._modifier_note: 107=FLAT. Positive value adds cast time to an otherwise instant spell.
effect._value_note: +1000ms = adds a 1-second cast to an instant spell. Note: instant spells have a base cast of 0ms, so this makes them take 1 second to cast.

affix_examples.name: Arcane Shot: +20% Damage
affix_examples._purpose: Arcane Shot deals 20% more damage on each hit. Affects all ranks.

effect._op_note: op=0 (SPELLMOD_DAMAGE). Scales the direct damage of the spell by a percentage.
effect._modifier_note: 108=PCT. value=20 means the spell hits for 120% of its normal damage.
effect._value_note: +20%. Arcane Shot Rank 10 (49045) deals 816-1050 base; with affix: ~979-1260.

affix_examples.name: Arcane Shot: +100% Cost, +100% Damage
affix_examples._purpose: Dual-effect affix: costs double mana, deals double damage. NOTE: SPELLMOD_CASTING_TIME cannot add cast time to instant spells — use COST or COOLDOWN as a penalty instead.

affix_examples.name: Arcane Shot: -5s Cooldown
affix_examples._purpose: Arcane Shot cooldown reduced by 5 seconds. Base cooldown is 6s; with affix: 1s.

effect._op_note: op=11 (SPELLMOD_COOLDOWN). FLAT unit is milliseconds. Negative value reduces cooldown.
effect._value_note: -5000ms = -5 seconds. Arcane Shot base cooldown is 6000ms; with affix: 1000ms (1s).
